data.title: High-performance Plastic Compounds Market worth $14.01 billion by 2030 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on March 27, 2026, as reported by MarketsandMarkets, the high-performance plastic compounds market is projected to grow significantly. The market is segmented by plastic type including PEEK, PPS, PEI, PSU, PPSU, PESU, fluoropolymer compounds, PAI, and others. It also considers additive types such as glass fiber, carbon fiber, mineral-filled, and color-compounded. This market analysis includes key numerical data and insights on various segments within the high-performance plastic compounds industry.

data.title: Vietnam detains suspects linked to ONUS in crypto scam, citing price manipulation, false ads, and market control. #fraud #arrests
data.description: Authorities in Vietnam have taken into custody several individuals connected to the ONUS organization in connection with a suspected token fraud scheme. Police have detailed allegations of price manipulation, deceptive advertising, and the exertion of control over the market.

data.title: Australian Binance unit fined $6.9M for failures in client onboarding, misclassifying clients and the use of high-risk crypto products.
data.description: Binance Australia Derivatives has been mandated by an Australian court to compensate $6.9 million due to inaccurately categorizing retail customers and subjecting them to potentially risky cryptocurrency offerings.

data.title: aql.com welcomes Levira Media Services to Leeds: 'Tere Tulemast Levira!'
data.description: Located in Leeds, England, the media company Levira, originally from Tallinn, Estonia, caters to renowned global broadcasters such as France 24, PBS America, and Warner Bros/Discovery. Levira has expanded its operations by setting up Levira Media Services Ltd. This move is part of their strategy to further solidify their presence in the industry and enhance their services to meet the demands of their clients.

data.title: GFL Environmental Inc. Sets Date for Q1 2026 Earnings Release
data.description: On March 27, 2026, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) revealed plans to disclose its first quarter financial outcomes for 2026 on April 29, 2026, after the market closes. The company will also conduct an investor conference call.

data.title: Trilogy Metals Announces Date of Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on March 27, 2026, Trilogy Metals Inc. (NYSE American: TMQ) (TSX: TMQ) announced its upcoming 2026 Annual General Meeting of the Shareholders ("AGM") scheduled for Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 10:00 am Pacific Time at the company's office.

data.title: STARTRADER Introduces 24/5 US Stock Trading, Expanding Access to Extended-Hours Markets
data.description: Traders now have the opportunity to trade top US stocks outside regular market hours for increased flexibility and continuous trading access. In a recent launch on March 27, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, STARTRADER has unveiled the option for 24/5 trading on a selection of 20 highly traded US stocks. This addition allows traders to tap into these new instruments for extended trading periods beyond the usual market hours.

data.title: Noah | Olive Co-Host 2026 AI Outlook, Redefining Global Allocation for Global Chinese Investors in the AI Era
data.description: In March 27, 2026, Noah Holdings Limited, trading as NOAH on NYSE and 6686 on HKEX, collaborated with Olive Asset Management for the NOAH | Olive AI Outlook 2026 forum in Hong Kong. This event served as their annual flagship gathering, uniting a global audience to discuss the latest trends and insights in asset allocation.
